---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report an issue with documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: ['documentation']
assignees: ''

---

## Documentation Issue

### Location
**Where is the documentation issue?**
Please specify:
- File name: [e.g. README.md, docs/installation.md]
- Section: [e.g. "Installation", "Getting Started", "API Reference"]
- URL (if applicable): [link to online documentation]

### Type of Issue
**What type of documentation issue is this?**
- [ ] Information is incorrect or outdated
- [ ] Information is missing
- [ ] Information is unclear or confusing
- [ ] Typo or grammatical error
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Code example doesn't work
- [ ] Formatting issue
- [ ] Other: [please describe]

### Current Content
**Current documentation (if applicable):**
```
Please paste the current text/code that has issues
```

### Suggested Fix
**Proposed correction or addition:**
```
Please provide the corrected text/code or describe what should be added
```

### Additional Context
**Additional information:**
- Why is this change important?
- What confusion does the current documentation cause?
- Any additional resources or examples that would be helpful?

### Impact
**Who does this affect?**
- [ ] New users getting started
- [ ] Experienced users looking for specific information
- [ ] Contributors/developers
- [ ] API users
- [ ] All users

## Checklist
- [ ] I have checked that this documentation issue doesn't already exist
- [ ] I have provided specific location information
- [ ] I have suggested a concrete improvement
- [ ] I have considered the impact on different types of users
